diagrams.title: Singly Linked List Node Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the internal structure of a single node and how nodes are connected
elements: NULL terminator (last node points to NULL)
HEAD pointer (external pointer to first node)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding node composition and list termination

diagrams.title: Insertion at Beginning Operation
diagrams.description: Visualizes the step-by-step process of adding a new node at the start of the list

diagrams.title: Insertion at Position (After Given Node)
diagrams.description: Shows how to insert a node in the middle of the list
elements: Pointer updates: new->next = prev->next, prev->next = new
diagrams.purpose: Understanding insertion in middle of list

diagrams.title: Deletion Operations in Singly Linked List
diagrams.description: Illustrates deletion of first node and deletion after a given node
diagrams.purpose: Learning safe deletion and memory management
